title: Save Dragon Egg from the Void
description: A data pack that saves the Dragon Egg from falling into the Void
body:
# Save Dragon Egg from the Void

![GitHub License](https://img.shields.io/github/license/RafalBerezin/Save_Dragon_Egg_from_the_Void?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)
[![Report a bug](https://img.shields.io/badge/Report%20a%20bug-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/RafalBerezin/Save_Dragon_Egg_from_the_Void/issues)
[![Request a feature](https://img.shields.io/badge/Request%20a%20feature-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/RafalBerezin/Save_Dragon_Egg_from_the_Void/issues)
[![Star or github](https://img.shields.io/badge/Star%20on%20Github-gray?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/RafalBerezin/Save_Dragon_Egg_from_the_Void)

[![Support me on Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Support%20me%20on%20Ko--fi-F16061?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/rafalberezin)

A simple Minecraft data pack to keep the Dragon Egg from falling into the Void.

---

This works for both Dragon Egg item and falling block.

When the Dragon Egg falls into the void, it'll fall on top of the **Exit Portal** in **The End** instead. To be specific, if the chunk is loaded, it'll appear 10 blocks above the highest block on **x0 z0** coordinates, and at **y 256** if it's not loaded.

---

If you want to be notified when the Dragoon Egg is saved from the Void, you can use the `/function commands:dragon_egg/toggle_notification` command to toggle the notification.
